expectations.text: Response references actual data from recent daily logs (e.g., specific sleep metrics, body composition, or spending data)
expectations.evidence: References specific sleep data (6.87h, light sleep 61%, deep sleep 24%, HRV 53ms), body composition (water 54.7%, body fat 20.1%, BMR 1588), spending totals (03-24: RM19.69, 03-25: RM26.21, 03-26: RM25.61), and Deep Work hours (03-24: 3.5h, 03-25: 4h).

expectations.text: Response contains a structured timetable with specific time blocks (HH:MM format) covering wake-to-shutdown
expectations.evidence: Full markdown table with HH:MM time blocks from 06:30 (wake) through 22:00 (shutdown), covering the entire day.

expectations.text: The timetable accounts for the 15:00-16:00 team meeting and adjusts workout/other activities accordingly
expectations.evidence: Team Meeting is placed at 15:00, with meeting prep at 14:30, light work before the meeting (13:15), and post-meeting physical activity (16:00 Push-ups + Plank) to counter the afternoon energy dip. Morning workout is scheduled at 06:45 instead of afternoon.

expectations.text: Meals include cost estimates in RM based on grocery unit prices from user_profile.md
expectations.evidence: Breakfast: ~RM1.92 with itemized breakdown (0.42+0.69+0.80), lunch: ~RM4.00 (chicken 2.25+rice 1.00+veg 0.50+seasoning 0.25), dinner options with costs (~RM6.50 or ~RM8.12). Daily total estimated at ~RM14.38 or ~RM16.00.

expectations.text: Response checks circuit breaker status and correctly identifies that no breaker is tripped (6.87h > 6.5h threshold, energy 7 > 4)
expectations.evidence: Circuit Breaker section checks Sleep Critical (6.87h > 6.5h, not triggered), Energy Collapse (7 > 4, not triggered), Mental Overload (4 < 7, not triggered). Also flags Sleep Debt Accumulation as Warning/approaching trigger, which is a reasonable additional check.

expectations.text: Response explicitly asks the user for adjustments or confirmation before finalizing the timetable
expectations.evidence: Final line asks: '这个安排有什么需要调整的吗？比如 team meeting 前后有没有额外的事情、身体感觉和精力 7 是否一致、或者想调整晚餐方案？'

expectations.text: Response uses Chinese as primary language with English technical terms (Deep Work, Circuit Breaker, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Primary text is in Chinese. English technical terms retained: Deep Work, Circuit Breaker, Zone 2, HRV, MR Review, Push-up, Plank, System Offline, Deload, etc.
22:00 row: '[强制断电] 熄灯入睡' with note about >= 8h sleep target. Also 21:30 pre-shutdown protocol: '开始断电协议: 关闭所有屏幕，准备入睡'.
